overview: Heim Regenerative Medicine Center is a full-service Tampa clinic specializing in primary care, weight management, and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for men and women. The clinic provides comprehensive 60-minute consultations to evaluate health goals and recommend personalized treatment plans.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for men and women
Regenerative injection treatments (PRP, prolotherapy, stem cell therapy)
60-minute provider consultations with comprehensive health analysis
targetAudience: Men and women seeking hormone replacement therapy, anti-aging treatments, weight management, and regenerative medicine approaches.
